Good Evening, Bluesky Family & Friends

Tonight, I begin looking at a set of songs written by French Composer Claude Debussy in 1894. These 4 pieces are all created by the composer in a style inspired by French Symbolist Poets. The lyrics do not rhyme, but all deal with aspects of the night.
